items.title: IDEA - ECB Rate Pause Sparks Search Spike for 'Cheap Mortgage Refinance Europe'
items.summary: Analytics show a sharp rise in searches around mortgage refinancing after the ECB held rates steady this week. Angle: explainer on what a rate pause means for variable-rate mortgage holders across the Eurozone, with a country-by-country comparison and a 'should you refinance now' checklist.

items.title: IDEA - EU Carbon Border Tax Phase-In Driving Traffic on 'CBAM Cost Calculator'
items.summary: Trend data shows importers searching for CBAM compliance tools as the carbon border adjustment mechanism moves toward full enforcement. Angle: a practical guide for SMEs on what CBAM certificates will cost per shipment, paired with an interactive calculator.

items.title: IDEA - Eurozone Inflation Cools Below Target, Readers Asking 'What Gets Cheaper Next'
items.summary: With headline inflation dipping under 2%, search interest is shifting from 'cost of living' to 'when will prices drop'. Angle: sector-by-sector breakdown (energy, food, travel) of where price relief is likely first and how long it typically lags official data.
